headline: T-Mobile’s hiring efforts take an unexpected turn after layoffs
summary: T-Mobile is ramping up hiring even after carrying out multiple rounds of layoffs tied to its shift toward becoming a digital-first company. After Sirini Gopalan became CEO of T-Mobile in November, the company quietly laid off an unknown number of employees the following month, impacting sales ...

headline: AT&T launches 4 new internet plans amid fight for customers
summary: AT&T has refreshed its internet plan lineup amid intensifying competition in the broadband industry. While AT&T welcomed 584,000 new internet customers in the first quarter of 2026, according to its most recent earnings report, T-Mobile attracted over 500,000 and Verizon gained 341,000. In ...
